# Custody Note

> Desktop app for freelance police station representatives and criminal solicitors. LAA-compliant custody notes, time recording, firm billing, and PDF export.

## About

Custody Note is a Windows desktop application designed for freelance police station representatives and criminal solicitors who attend police stations on behalf of defence firms across England and Wales. It provides structured, LAA-compliant custody notes, automatic time recording, multi-firm billing, and one-click PDF export.

## Key pages

- Home: https://custodynote.com
- How it works: https://custodynote.com/how-it-works
- Pricing: https://custodynote.com/pricing
- Download: https://custodynote.com/download
- Free trial: https://custodynote.com/trial
- Cloud Backup: https://custodynote.com/cloud-backup
- Support: https://custodynote.com/support
- Contact: https://custodynote.com/contact
- Changelog: https://custodynote.com/changelog

## Pricing

- Standard: £29/month or £290/year (save £58)
- Standard + Cloud Backup: £39/month or £390/year (save £78)
- 30-day free trial included, no credit card required

## Core features

- Attendance notes, telephone advice (INVB), and Quick Capture
- Multi-firm tracking and billing with disbursements and VAT
- LAA outcome codes, stage reached, and fee codes
- PACE review tracking (1st, 2nd, 3rd reviews)
- Case details with offence picker and disclosure fields
- PDF export for firms, clients, and courts
- Works fully offline at any police station
- Encrypted cloud backup with AWS Object Lock (optional add-on)

## System requirements

- Windows 10 or Windows 11
- 4 GB RAM minimum (8 GB recommended)
- 200 MB free disk space
- Internet required only for licence validation and cloud backup
